# `git-update-dirs`

Pull and rebase all git repos in subdirectories


- **Usage**: `git-update-dirs [FLAGS]`

## Flags

### `--help`

Display help

### `--version`

Display version

### `-v --verbose`

Verbose output

### `-q --quiet`

Quiet output

### `--force`

Force operations
